steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question tests word choice precision. The decisive clue is the example: live performances featured videos of people sharing their stories and audience members sharing pictures of their hairstyles. The blank must describe people taking an active role in Zollar's creative process.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'nervous about': describes an emotional state of anxiety; nothing in the text suggests people feel anxious about Zollar's creative process. ✗
  • Choice B — 'completed by': implies Zollar's process makes the audience whole or finished; the text instead shows the audience contributing to the process, not being completed by it. ✗
  • Choice C — 'delayed by': implies the audience obstructs or postpones Zollar's process; the text describes the opposite, with audiences actively participating. ✗
  • Choice D — 'involved in': means playing an active role in; precisely matches the example of audience members contributing stories and pictures to the performances. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
